title: podmanv2 pod inspect
body:
Add the ability to inspect pod in podmanv2

Signed-off-by: Sujil02 <sushah@redhat.com>

comments.body:
LGTM 

@baude Should `podman inspect` be enhanced to call pod inspect now?
IMO, no - `docker inspect` doesn't do volumes, for example, last I checked.
:umbrella: The latest upstream changes (presumably #5684) made this pull request unmergeable. Please resolve the merge conflicts.
:umbrella: The latest upstream changes (presumably #5645) made this pull request unmergeable. Please resolve the merge conflicts.
